tool_args.label: Kronos Timekeeping System Outage Impact
tool_args.raw_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Please note that the current month's actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results. Subsequent revision may also be required due to impacts of Kronos timekeeping system outage.

payload.gap_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Please note that the current month's actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results. Subsequent revision may also be required due to impacts of Kronos timekeeping system outage.
payload.missing_information: Post-close adjustments and Kronos timekeeping system outage impacts not yet reflected
